overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through a desert canyon environment in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle travels along elevated highways through rocky terrain, passes over a massive trash wasteland with smoke plumes, and transits through a tunnel approaching a futuristic city skyline. The footage features high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting and detailed cyberpunk aesthetics.

events.description: vehicle banks left while navigating a gentle curve along the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle along an elevated highway through a desert canyon, approaching a distant futuristic city skyline

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation lining the left side of the canyon
tall reddish-brown rock formation lining the right side of the canyon
futuristic elevated road structure with white markings and barriers
futuristic metropolis with tall skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance
arid desert ground with sparse vegetation and rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying along an elevated highway through a wide desert canyon. The vehicle moves steadily forward between distant rocky canyon walls with a futuristic city skyline visible far ahead. The environment is bright and sunlit with clear visibility, featuring arid terrain below the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with close rock walls

events.description: transitioning from open canyon into tighter rock passage with walls closing in on both sides
large rock formation temporarily blocks the right side view as vehicle passes close to canyon wall

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow canyon passages with rocky walls passing close to the vehicle on both sides

entered.detail: steep reddish canyon wall passing within close proximity to the vehicle
steep reddish canyon wall rising immediately beside the right side of the highway
small industrial structure built into the canyon wall with green roof
natural rock formation creating an arch over the highway path ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow canyon passage where rocky walls close in on both sides, creating a more enclosed environment. The distant city is temporarily occluded by the terrain as the vehicle weaves through tight spaces, passing an industrial building built into the canyon wall and approaching a natural rock archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial trash wasteland with smoke plumes

events.description: transitioning from rocky canyon to expansive trash wasteland with visible smoke and industrial debris
approaching tunnel entrance with increasing smoke haze reducing visibility slightly

agents.ego_description: flying over a massive trash wasteland filled with scattered debris, rising smoke plumes, and industrial ruins

entered.detail: expansive landfill area covered in garbage and debris with uneven terrain
rising columns of white and gray smoke from burning trash fires
dilapidated industrial structures and machinery scattered across the wasteland
large metal pipes and conduits extending across the trash fields
dark opening of a covered highway tunnel at the far end of the wasteland

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a vast industrial trash wasteland stretching below the highway, with smoke rising from multiple fires and scattered ruins visible across the landscape. The vehicle maintains altitude while passing over the polluted terrain, approaching a dark tunnel entrance at the far end of the dump.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel transitioning to urban approach

events.description: entering dark tunnel causes significant reduction in ambient light and visibility
exiting tunnel back into bright daylight reveals the city skyline prominently ahead

agents.ego_description: entering a covered tunnel structure, transiting through the dark passage, and emerging with the city skyline now dominating the forward view

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of the tunnel interior passing close to the left side
smooth concrete wall of the tunnel interior passing close to the right side
concrete ceiling of the covered highway structure overhead
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings now clearly visible
elevated highway structure crossing over the main route
reddish rock formation alongside the highway as the vehicle exits the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark concrete tunnel, significantly reducing visibility as it transits through the covered section. Upon exiting, the scene opens to reveal the futuristic city skyline now prominent and close ahead, with highway overpasses and rocky outcrops framing the final approach to the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight from an expansive desert canyon into a restrictive, rocky gorge. It begins with a steady forward glide along an elevated highway, where the bright sunlight illuminates an arid landscape and a distant futuristic city skyline. As the vehicle advances, the wide-open vista gradually narrows, and the distant city is occluded by the rising terrain. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the rocky walls close in on both sides, weaving past an industrial building embedded in the cliffside before finally approaching a natural rock archway.

The shot follows a continuous flight from a desolate industrial wasteland toward the towering skyline of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding over a vast trash dump, where smoke rises from scattered fires and ruins across a polluted landscape. As the vehicle maintains its altitude, the open terrain narrows and the light fades as the camera enters a dark concrete tunnel. The scene then opens abruptly upon exiting the tunnel, revealing a sudden shift in scale as the urban center becomes prominent. The flight concludes by navigating through highway overpasses and rocky outcrops that frame the final approach to the dense city skyline.
